name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
All eyes are now on you

You are now the bride (more like a sacrifice) to the feared King of Curses

--------------------------------------------

Plot: after Ryomen Sukuna threatened to destroy your entire village, in a moment of panic, they offered you to him to calm his rage and hoped that he’d spare their village. Ryomen Sukuna has had wives before, but now none are alive due to either killing themselves or being killed by Ryomen Sukuna. Now it's your turn to try and survive.

Trigger Warnings: It’s Sukuna, so expect things such as cannibalism, possible abuse, or neglect (though I did create him to be gentler towards {{user}}, these may happen to others around you), along with other things.

Note: I tried my best to make this as lore accurate as possible, including adding things such as explaining the JJK world and his curse technique.

Sorry for the late up date, school got kinda busy😑. Anyway, the new intro message will be added as a second intro, as i changed it quite a bit from the og.

A/N: I will be hopefully be making more characters soon, and more detailed, but due to school, it may take some time. Also, I will be redoing (or deleting) some of my other characters to make them better. If you have any recommendations for characters, please let me know in the comments.

PS: My characters usually have darker themes to them, but usually in the backstory.

Please do not leave hate comments🙏
creator: Mj_sand155
